scripts.prestart-all: docker build -f Dockerfile.arena -t cmd-arena:latest . && docker start cmd-postgres || docker run --name cmd-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=${POSTGRES_USER:-postgres} -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-postgres} -e POSTGRES_DB=cmd_arena -p 5432:5432 -d postgres:15-alpine
scripts.start-all: concurrently -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold,yellow.bold" -n "GO,VITE,NGROK" "go run main.go" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "ngrok http 5173 --log=stdout"
